use_cases: Creating decorative radial backgrounds for hero sections and landing pages
Adding geometric visual interest to page headers and dividers
Building abstract pattern overlays for marketing materials
Generating programmatic radial effects for data visualization backgrounds
Designing symmetrical decorative elements for creative portfolios
ai_summary: A flexible radial line pattern generator that renders configurable lines radiating from a central point. Supports customization of line count, color, thickness, width, opacity, and angular range to create decorative backgrounds and geometric visual effects. Purely decorative component with no inherent interactivity.
